title: Dungeon / Site Theme
note: The character of a themed location. Traverse it as a Clock (fu.py clock). Layer the created world's magic/technology level onto the theme.

entries.value: Ancient ruin of a fallen civilization
Sealed vault or tomb — guardians and curses
Corrupted natural place — blighted forest, poisoned mine
Arcane laboratory or workshop gone wrong
Shifting, unreal space — dream, pocket world, or Wyld
